Goosehonk

2022
Collab
Javascript
Showcase
Alextheomfg

Goosehonk is an API for Desktop Goose for Mac. It uses javascript to communicate with MacOs applescript to tell desktop goose to pull the memes and yo mamma jokes.

Goosehonk was written in javascript and used the applescript integration in Desktop Goose for Mac. The memes are taken from the r/memes subreddit, and the yo mamma jokes are taken from a public npm package called yo-mamma.

Back to projects
